items.item: Local Normal v4 full-body runtime and broad geometry robustness
items.detail: Three of three seeds passed runtime and broad full-body landmark checks.
Two of three seeds retained the requested wardrobe; seed 711670302 changed leggings to fitted shorts.
The bounded EC2 run completed with the required model and control input hashes verified.
Twelve nodes and 36 inputs were validated with zero schema errors before prompt submission.

items.item: Target-runtime image and Normal diagnostic visual QA
items.detail: Both 768x1024 RGB artifacts were nonblank, hash-matched, complete, and had zero major visual defects.
The approved EC2 instance is stopped and the emergency schedule absence was verified.
Only the still-mutating ComfyUI log mismatched; both images matched. The runner was fixed and its log-stability regression passes 38/38.
Certification applies only to seed 711670303 with the exact recorded standing Normal-map configuration.
No gold masks were consumed, no mask gates were rerun, and no detailed body/hand/contact authority is claimed.

next_action: Queue OpenPose as the next unproven target-runtime lane, but do not launch it until its concurrent workflow edits are checkpointed and the normal readiness gates pass.
